name: Poligrafica S. Faustino S.p.A.
summary: Poligrafica S. Faustino S.p.A. engages in the printing business in Italy. It is also involved in direct marketing, electronic document management, e-procurement, and creation of tools for games and competitions. In addition, the company produces labels and packaging products; and operates as a digital marketing agency. The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Castrezzato, Italy.
